message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-enforcement-config): pin EnforcementConfig + AllowedConnector/Operation matchers + EnforcementConfigError contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-uxtgf)

31 tests pinning the host-side enforcement gate config that drives
checkpoint freshness, revocation freshness, taint classification,
and per-zone allowlist enforcement. Zero prior coverage.

- EnforcementConfig::default: checkpoint_max_age_ms=300_000 (5min),
  revocation_max_age_ms=600_000 (10min), critical_taint_flags=
  ['pii','phi','classified','financial'] (in order), 3 zone maps
  empty, revocation_registry=None
- EnforcementConfig::new() == default()
- with_* builders preserve other fields, replace targeted field
  (with_critical_taint_flags REPLACES, not appends)
- add_zone_membership: accepts valid zone, rejects malformed zone
  via InvalidZoneId, aggregates multiple zones per principal
- add_zone_connector: accepts valid pair + wildcard, rejects
  malformed zone (InvalidZoneId) or connector (InvalidConnectorId)
- add_zone_operation: accepts valid pair + wildcard, rejects
  malformed zone or operation
- AllowedConnector / AllowedOperation: Any == Any but != specific;
  specific == matching id but != different id; Hash + HashSet dedup
- EnforcementConfigError 3 variants Display literal substrings
  ('invalid zone id' / 'invalid connector id' /
  'invalid operation id') for log greps + std::error::Error trait

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
